package.name: openral_foxglove_bringup
package.description:
PROTOTYPE / SPIKE — bringup wrapper for upstream foxglove_bridge as a read-only live visualisation surface for OpenRAL. Exposes only the "Bucket-1" topics (camera images, /map occupancy grid, octomap point cloud, joint states, TF, robot_description) over the Foxglove WebSocket protocol, with client-publish and service capabilities DISABLED so the surface cannot actuate the robot. Ships a default Foxglove Studio layout in config/openral_layout.json.
This is a feasibility spike (see docs/investigations/foxglove-dashboard-port-feasibility.md). Graduating it past prototype — and any path that re-enables clientPublish/services (e.g. an E-stop button) — requires the ADR called out in that report plus safety-WG review (CLAUDE.md §3).
